title: Adding images into forms
excerpt:

posts.author: Cochoa020 (Cindy Ochoa)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Would be nice to be able to add images into the form, aside from just the header image. I have a form for uniform ordering - Ideally, if they select “mens > polos” it would then go to a question asking for their size which has an image of our sizing chart for mens polos.

What are you trying to achieve

Allow images to be embedded within form questions

posts.author: ram_perel (Ram Perel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Cidny,

That is a great feature request and it is actually possible using SuperForm!

Here is a video showing how you can accomplish that using SuperForm.

Here is an installation link directly into your account.

We are available at support@spot-nik.com for any future questions you may have.

Thanks and happy holidays!

Ram
